# Yorick Docs

> Community-driven documentation for FiveM server setup, txAdmin, security best practices, and more.

## About

Yorick Docs is an open-source documentation site maintained by Yorick (https://github.com/yorick2002). It provides step-by-step guides for setting up and managing FiveM servers on both Linux and Windows, configuring txAdmin, handling databases, security hardening, and general development tools.

## Sections

- FiveM Server (Linux): Create server, Database, Domain setup, Resources, Auto-update
- FiveM Server (Windows): Create server, Database, Portforwarding, Resources, Server Banner, Winrar
- FiveM Client: Update Channel
- txAdmin: Bot setup, Create account, Master Account, Update
- General: XAMPP
- Security: Backdoors, Sandboxing

## Links

- Website: https://docs.yorick.gg
- Source: https://github.com/yorick2002/Nextra-FiveM
- Author: https://github.com/yorick2002
